---
title: "Publications"
toc: false
---

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-venue}
PLOS ONE · May 2024
:::
::: {.pub-title}
[Automatic quantification of tumor-stroma ratio as a prognostic biomarker for pancreatic cancer](https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0301969)
:::
::: {.pub-meta}
**Vendittelli P**, et al.
Multi-class U-Net for TSR segmentation across 368 patients / 4 datasets (25 NL labs). Dice 0.75 (epithelium) and 0.86 (tumor bulk) on external TCGA-PAAD validation. TSR AUC 0.61 for 6-month survival prediction on an independent cohort.
:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-venue}
MIDL 2023 · Sep 2023 · Poster
:::
::: {.pub-title}
[Automatic quantification of TSR as a prognostic marker for pancreatic cancer](https://openreview.net/pdf?id=Dtz_iaUpGc)
:::
::: {.pub-meta}
**Vendittelli P**, et al.
Segmentation of tumor epithelium, healthy epithelium, and TSR estimation from pancreatic whole-slide images.
:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-venue}
Cancers (MDPI) · Jul 2022 · Review
:::
::: {.pub-title}
[Setting the research agenda for clinical AI in pancreatic adenocarcinoma imaging](https://doi.org/10.3390/cancers14143498)
:::
::: {.pub-meta}
**Vendittelli P**, et al.
Systematic review of the current role of AI for pancreatic cancer diagnosis and personalised treatment planning.
:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-venue}
SPIE Medical Imaging · Apr 2022 · Poster
:::
::: {.pub-title}
[Automatic tumour segmentation in H&E-stained whole-slide images of the pancreas](https://doi.org/10.1117/12.2611542)
:::
::: {.pub-meta}
**Vendittelli P**, et al.
Multi-task U-Net with auxiliary classification head for coarse pancreatic tumour area segmentation; classification head reduced false positives.
:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-venue}
European Radiology · 2025
:::
::: {.pub-title}
End-to-end prognostication in pancreatic cancer by multimodal deep learning: a retrospective, multicenter study
:::
::: {.pub-meta}
Schuurmans M, Saha A, Alves N, **Vendittelli P**, et al.
Multimodal deep learning combining CT imaging and clinical data for PDAC outcome prediction across multiple centers.
:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-venue}
The Lancet Oncology · 2025
:::
::: {.pub-title}
Artificial intelligence and radiologists in pancreatic cancer detection using standard of care CT scans (PANORAMA): an international, paired, non-inferiority, confirmatory, observational study
:::
::: {.pub-meta}
Alves N, Schuurmans M, Rutkowski D, Saha A, **Vendittelli P**, et al.
International paired non-inferiority study comparing AI and radiologists for pancreatic cancer detection on standard-of-care CT.
:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-venue}
Medical Image Analysis · 2025 · Review
:::
::: {.pub-title}
Navigating the landscape of multimodal AI in medicine: a scoping review on technical challenges and clinical applications
:::
::: {.pub-meta}
Schouten D, Nicoletti G, Dille B, Chia C, **Vendittelli P**, et al.
Scoping review on technical challenges and clinical applications of multimodal AI in medicine.
:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-venue}
COMPAYL Workshop, MICCAI 2025 · Sep 2025 · Poster
:::
::: {.pub-title}
Combining AI-based Biomarkers for PDAC Survival
:::
::: {.pub-meta}
Hensens L, Sabroso-Lasa S, Verbeke C, Malats N, Litjens G, **Vendittelli P**.
Multi-tissue segmentation pipeline integrating TSR, mitosis density, stromal cell density and tumor-to-tissue ratio for multivariate survival prediction in pancreatic cancer.
:::
:::
